findings.message: The parallelism guide says TASK-03 and TASK-04 can run in parallel, but both tasks explicitly modify repositories.server.ts and coordinate around the same thread-row contract.
Post-migration verification command is not a reliable backfill check. COUNT(*) WHERE guest_first_name IS NOT NULL under-reports for threads without guest names. Also omits D1 database name.
CI verification step underspecified. gh run watch without a run ID does not guarantee watching the correct push.
